_meta.note: Blowup track DoD — core6 modules smoke PASS + [11*] foundation axiom promotion.

description: Definition-of-Done tiers for the blowup engine. Each tier requires core6 modules to exist, be runnable, and finally reach [11*] axiom foundation.

scaffold_done.description: core6 modules all present on disk (field/holographic/quantum/string/toe/absolute).

wired_done.description: core6 each runnable via blowup.hexa --modules single. seed_engine merge non-empty.

serving_done.description: [11*] axioms stable — DELTA0_ABSOLUTE_THEOREM + ULTRA_UNIFORMITY_THEOREM both present in atlas.n6 foundation block.
